full_text:
Meng You 孟優
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Meng You (孟優). Meng Huo’s brother. Captured by Zhuge Liang. Meng You is a fictional character. Meng You was affiliated with Nanman.
